element_introduction_order.mastery_context: foundational weapon for all combat encounters
mid-tier weapon, more powerful than basic guns
area damage capability for grouped enemies
advanced targeting, useful for evasive enemies
speed boost for evasion; trades firepower for mobility
optional high-power weapon for skilled players; discovery-based
gate progression; requires mastery of current weapon arsenal

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast, high-energy action sequences with alternating combat engagement and navigation/exploration phases; intense bursts separated by mission checkpoints

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Secret tunnels and hidden ships reward exploration beyond mandatory objectives
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden missions (CD-ROM version bonus content); secret weapon pickups; alternative routes through level space

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory weapon combat in open space; single-objective missions to establish core flight mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Multi-objective missions; introduction of advanced weapons; increased enemy density and boss complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex mission chains; challenging boss encounters; Episode 3 finale against Xenocidic Initiative supercomputer
notable_spikes: Boss encounter at end of each planet
Hidden bonus mission (CD-ROM version) - post-campaign content

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of 27 missions consists of multiple objectives (enemy destruction, checkpoint navigation, tunnel entrance/exit, extraction point) culminating in a boss battle at planet's end
3 episodes × 3 worlds per episode = 9 main level sets; Episode 3 final planet (Proxima Seven) condensed to 2 stages; each planet culminates in unique boss encounter
Primary mission flow is linear (checkpoint → objective → extraction) but level design permits detours to discover secret tunnels and hidden ships
Periodic tunnel sections introduce spatial navigation constraints, requiring precise maneuvering and heightening tension compared to open-space combat
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Missions with mandatory tunnel traversal objectives
